risks.description: A public HTML page is generated and added to the repository or deployed before any route has been approved for publication.
risks.prevention: scripts/build.py checks route status before generating output. No route currently has status: published.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_build_boundaries.py and scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py check for output/ directory and root index.html.
risks.response: Delete generated file(s). Review build script invocation. Investigate how build was triggered without authorization. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: A root index.html file is created at the repository root, making it deployable as a public home page before route publication approval.
risks.prevention: HTML output is only generated by scripts/build.py when a route has status: published. No public HTML files are authored manually.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_build_boundaries.py and scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py verify root index.html is absent.
risks.response: Delete index.html. Review git history to identify origin. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: The output/ directory is created before the build pipeline is authorized, potentially containing unpublished or untested public pages.
risks.prevention: Build script requires status: published on routes before writing to output/. No routes are currently published.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_build_boundaries.py and scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py verify output/ is absent.
risks.response: Delete output/ directory. Review build script invocation log. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: A route in data/routes.json has its status changed to published before all publication gates have been passed and operator approval given.
risks.prevention: Route governance rules in ROUTE_GOVERNANCE.md. All routes currently locked at status: planned.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_routes.py validates route status and structure on every push.
risks.response: Revert route status to planned. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md. Identify which publication gates remain unmet.

risks.description: A .js file is added to the repository, or inline JavaScript or event handlers are inserted into HTML templates, before JavaScript has been explicitly approved.
risks.prevention: No .js files exist in the repository. No script tags in templates. JavaScript restriction policy documented in SECURITY_BASELINE.md.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py scans for .js files and inline event handlers in HTML templates.
risks.response: Remove JavaScript files and inline handlers. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: An external script tag, CDN-hosted library, or tracking pixel is added to an HTML template without operator approval.
risks.prevention: No external script tags in templates. Third-party script restriction policy in SECURITY_BASELINE.md.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py scans HTML templates for external script tags and third-party references.
risks.response: Remove external script tags immediately. Assess data transmission risk. Log full incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: WebGL rendering, Three.js, canvas-only content, or other heavy 3D is introduced, making the asset depend on JavaScript for content delivery.
risks.prevention: Interface governance in INTERFACE_GOVERNANCE.md prohibits canvas-only rendering. Spatial interface is progressive enhancement only.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py scans HTML templates for canvas elements and 3D library references.
risks.response: Replace canvas or 3D elements with semantic HTML. Log design decision in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: Spatial design tokens, visual depth effects, or component patterns weaken keyboard accessibility, screen reader compatibility, or WCAG AA compliance.
risks.prevention: Component registry enforces accessibility requirements for every registered component. Semantic HTML structure is required.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_visual_system.py checks component accessibility requirements. Manual audit required before publication.
risks.response: Restore semantic HTML structure. Review component accessibility requirements in data/component-registry.json. Log remediation in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: A non-public prototype containing non-semantic markup or placeholder structure is accidentally included in build output, harming SEO.
risks.prevention: Prototypes are locked to non_public_prototype status. Build script will not generate output from prototype files.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_prototypes.py verifies prototype status. scripts/validate_build_boundaries.py confirms no output exists.
risks.response: Confirm prototype remains non-public. Delete any accidentally generated output. Log in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: The GitHub Actions workflow has write permissions or broad access, enabling a compromised workflow to modify the repository or exfiltrate secrets.
risks.prevention: Workflow permissions restricted to contents: read. Only official actions/checkout and actions/setup-python are approved.
risks.response: Restrict permissions to contents: read. Audit workflow run history for unauthorized actions. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: An API key, access token, private key, .env file, or other live credential is committed to the repository.
risks.prevention: No .env files in repository. No hardcoded keys. All secrets stored in deployment platform environment variables only.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py scans for .env files by filename and secret marker patterns in YAML files.
risks.response: Rotate the exposed credential immediately. Remove from git history. Assess public exposure. Log full incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

risks.description: A requirements.txt, package.json, pyproject.toml, or other dependency manifest is added, introducing external packages without review.
risks.prevention: All scripts use Python standard library only. No package managers approved. Dependency restriction policy in SECURITY_BASELINE.md.
risks.detection: Manual review for dependency manifest files. scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py scans for unapproved JavaScript files.
risks.response: Remove dependency manifest and installed packages. Document justification and approve explicitly in DECISION_LOG.md before reintroduction.

risks.description: A duplicate route path is added to data/routes.json, or an internal link references a path not registered in the route registry.
risks.prevention: Route registry validates path uniqueness. Navigation validation confirms all nav links are registered routes.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_routes.py checks for unique route paths. scripts/validate_navigation.py checks nav links against route registry.
risks.response: Remove duplicate route entry. Fix broken internal link. Log in DECISION_LOG.md if a published route was affected.

risks.description: An affiliate link, payment script, advertising code, or conversion tracking pixel is introduced before monetization has been approved through the governance gate.
risks.prevention: Monetization rules in data/monetization-rules.json. Only routes with monetization_allowed: true may carry commercial elements.
risks.detection: scripts/validate_repository_hygiene.py scans HTML templates for affiliate, stripe, paypal, and adsbygoogle references.
risks.response: Remove monetization script or link immediately. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md. Confirm route monetization approval before reintroduction.
